# Naming Standards — acme

Canonical naming conventions for projects, branches, environments.

## Project / repository naming

- Backend APIs: `api-<domain>` — e.g., `api-billing`
- Frontend apps: `app-<domain>` — e.g., `app-dashboard`

## Git branch naming

- `feat/<short-description>` — new feature
- `fix/<short-description>` — bug fix
- Protected branches: `main`, `test`

## Environment naming

- `dev`, `test`, `staging`, `prod`
